test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT number FROM numbers(2500000) INTERSECT ALL SELECT number FROM numbers(2500000))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT number AS a, number + 1 AS b FROM numbers(2000000) INTERSECT ALL SELECT number AS a, number + 1 AS b FROM numbers(2000000))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT toString(number) AS s FROM numbers(2000000) EXCEPT ALL SELECT toString(number) AS s FROM numbers(1000000))
